channel.title: Saltbox on Terminal
channel.description: Recent content in Saltbox on Terminal

item.title: Learning Ansible: Getting Salty
item.description: When starting out with ansible, it’s common to begin with tutorials. Good places to start are those by Jeff Geerling, Learn Linux TV, tech-tubers like Techno Tim, Jim’s Garage, and a range of others. For me, these helped - but I’m a firm believer in simply getting hands on with ansible and taking a look at how others have approached their plays, tasks, roles, and then trying it out for yourself, adapting it for your needs, and building upon it. Whatever you’re setting out to do, chances are someones been down the same path. Ansible Galaxy is a good source for this, but I’ve found Saltbox most helpful.
